parts.text: You are an expert interior designer and location scout. Analyze this carpet image and provide: 1) Color palette (dominant colors), 2) Pattern style (geometric, floral, abstract, etc.), 3) Texture and pile description, 4) Mood and ambiance (luxurious, rustic, modern, bohemian, etc.), 5) Top 5 ideal real-world location settings where this carpet would look best (e.g., Moroccan riad, Scandinavian living room, luxury hotel lobby, etc.), 6) Recommended room types, 7) Suggested complementary decor elements. Format the response as a JSON object.

parameters.subject: Carpet Analysis Failed - {{ $json.carpetId }}
